brief_summary: Five-chip horizontal buy card. Window: 2026-05-01 to 2026-05-29. Runner: KBDfans, single configurator. Profile: CYL (Cherry-clone family). Material: doubleshot ABS. Region: global, no regional proxy. All chips coral-bordered. Caption: 'second and probably final shot at this set's specific colorway in doubleshot ABS'.
